meta.siteTitle: ABC OS — The operating system for African cooperatives
meta.siteDescription: ABC OS is the operating system for African cooperatives: a regenerative platform where we learn, build, and tell — together — the brands of the next civilization.
meta.ogTitle: ABC OS — From learning to civilization
meta.ogDescription: A regenerative platform for African cooperatives: Community, Learn, Build, Brand.

hero.lede: ABC OS is the operating system for African cooperatives: a regenerative platform where we learn, build, and tell — together — the brands of the next civilization.

manifesto.p1Lead: We believe Africa's economic future is not written in competition, but in
manifesto.p1Tail: . The most enduring brands are born from communities rooted in land, in knowledge, in memory.
manifesto.p2Lead: ABC OS brings into a single tool what it takes to
manifesto.p2Tail: a regenerative cooperative. A solarpunk compass for the builders of the next civilization.

pillars.lede: Each hub is an independent and complete tool — together they form the full ecosystem of a regenerative cooperative.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: The Assembly
community.desc: Discussions, events and cooperatives — the digital agora where alliances are forged.

learn.title: Learn
learn.subtitle: Cultivating knowledge
learn.desc: Six pathways to build a shared sense — from architect principles to solarpunk principles.

build.title: Build
build.subtitle: Building together
build.desc: The concrete tools of the cooperative: contracts, treasury, partners, milestones.

brand.title: Brand
brand.subtitle: Your identity
brand.desc: Measure resonance, tell your story, amplify your cooperative's reach.

tour.lede: Hover each screen to see what a day inside the cooperative looks like. Everything is mobile-first and offline-capable.

steps.title: Learn
steps.body: Embark on a six-chapter journey — from architect principles to solarpunk principles. At your own pace, in French or English.

steps.title: Cooperate
steps.body: Join an existing cooperative or found your own. Find co-builders aligned with your mission, near you or elsewhere on the continent.

steps.title: Civilize
steps.body: Launch your cooperative brand. Measure your impact, tell your story, inscribe your work in the regenerative civilization to come.

testimonials.quote1: ABC OS turned our weavers' cooperative into a continental brand. Before: a notebook and scattered WhatsApp messages. Today: a system that learns, structures, and tells.
testimonials.quote2: The Build hub gave us the rigor of a scale-up — without renouncing our values. Three milestones in two months.
testimonials.quote3: The Brand tracks helped us double our reach in six months. Cooperative storytelling is the weapon of the century.

items.a: Any entrepreneur, artisan, farmer or creative based in Africa (or in the diaspora) who wants to build an economic activity in cooperation rather than competition. Existing cooperatives can migrate their operations onto the platform.

items.q: How much does the platform cost?
items.a: Learning is free and will stay free. Build and Brand tools are billed as a percentage of your cooperative's revenue — never upfront, and capped.
Yes. ABC OS is designed for low-connectivity environments: downloadable courses, background sync, lightweight mobile mode.

items.q: How do I join an existing cooperative?
items.a: From the Community Hub, browse the cooperative directory and apply to those that resonate with your mission. Cooperatives validate their members collectively.

cta.lede: Sign up to the founding list. You'll receive the manifesto, early access to the platform, and an invitation to the next regenerative assembly.
cta.legalNote: No spam. One letter per month. One-click unsubscribe.

footer.tagline: African Business Cooperatives — Operating System. A digital common for the regenerative civilization to come.

feed.kpText: Looking for advice from anyone who has gone through the process. What are the key documents and registrations required?
